response.step_by_step_log: The video was analyzed to identify two main performance segments. The first song, 'スキって言ってよ' (Sukitte Itte yo), was identified through audio and visual cues. The search query was 'スキって言ってよ Kairiki Bear Japanese and English lyrics'. The second song, 'ないない' (Nai Nai), was identified with credits listed on screen (Lyrics: Hayashikei, Music: Kegani) and confirmed as a ReoNa song via the search 'ないない ReoNa Japanese and English lyrics'. Lyrics were compiled for both.
response.global_summary: A virtual concert performance by Roboco-san, featuring two distinct songs: 'Sukitte Itte yo' and 'Nai Nai'. Each segment showcases Roboco-san's singing and performance skills in a digital, concert-style environment.

scenes.description: Roboco-san performs 'Sukitte Itte yo'. The song is fast-paced and energetic. Text indicating the song title is visible on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
今すぐに私をスキって言ってよ
こんなワガママいうことも
甘えちゃうのも
本当はね
大好きだから言うんだよ
ずっと一緒がいいもんね
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Please say you like me right now
Even such selfishness
Even clinging on like this
Truly, it's because I love you
Saying it all
I want us to be together forever, okay?

scenes.description: Roboco-san transitions and begins performing 'Nai Nai'. Visuals include a temple-like structure in the background. Credits for the song appear briefly.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
灰のない深いかげばかり
アイのない個体 人形(doll)みたい
自分不在 どこにもいない
ないじゃない？
曖昧なアイ 色の無い眼(eye)
擬態 意外! 他人事みたい
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Just deep shadows without ash
An individual without love, a doll, like a doll
I'm absent, I'm not anywhere
Is it not 'not here'?
Ambiguous love
Colorless eyes, mimicry
Unexpected! Like someone else's affair
